subcodes.first_line: The letter of that honored personage hath been received. From its gentle breeze, utmost joy and felicity were vouchsafed. God willing, in all seasons... ...Ye are forbidden to commit adultery, sodomy and lechery. Avoid them, O concourse of the faithful. By the righteousness of God! Ye have been called into being to purge the world from the defilement of evil passions
subcodes.first_line_orig: رقیمه آنجناب رسید از نفحات آن کمال بهجت و سرور دست داد انشاء الله در کل احیان... قل قد حرم علیکم الزینا و اللواط
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Muhammad; Islam, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @unchastity and adultery, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
